name: Curried Pumpkin Soup
recipeIngredient: Optional: 2 tbsp chives – finely chopped or 1 cup sour cream
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-large saucepan, sauté the onions and scallions in butter until golden brown.
2. Stir in the pumpkin puree.
3. Add the chicken broth, bay leaf, brown sugar, curry powder, nutmeg, and parsley.
4. Simmer, uncovered, for 15 minutes.
5. Transfer the soup to a food processor and puree with half and half or chicken stock until smooth and creamy with medium density.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Serve with chopped chives or a dollop of sour cream or crème fraîche.
